question: ## Naming and Description Review\nGood saved-search names make triage and ownership obvious. Compare the title, description, and alert text against the metadata table above.
Does the correlation label follow the expected format?
description: Check local naming standards, severity prefix/suffix, and whether the label is analyst-readable.

question: Does the description first line match the use case title?
description: The first line should describe the detection outcome, not implementation details.

question: Is the detection name clear and meaningful?
description: A good title names the suspicious behaviour, relevant platform, and scope without being too long.

question: Naming review notes
description: Suggest exact title/description wording when changes are needed.
